array_of_export_objects_for_list_matters: Array of export objects (for list_matters_export without exportId)
array_of_hold_objects_for_list_matters_h: Array of hold objects (for list_matters_holds without holdId)
array_of_matter_objects_for_list_matters: Array of matter objects (for list_matters without matterId)
connect_google_vault_to_create_exports_l: Connect Google Vault to create exports, list exports, and manage holds within matters.
create_a_vault_export_for_a_matter_using: Create a Vault export for a matter using a search query, then retrieve the export files.
create_a_vault_matter_and_place_a_legal: Create a Vault matter and place a legal hold on custodians for an investigation or litigation.
describe_the_end_date_e_g_today_end: Describe the end date (e.g., "today", "end of last quarter")...
describe_the_purpose_of_this_matter: Describe the purpose of this matter...
describe_what_content_to_search_for: Describe what content to search for...
downloaded_export_file_userfile_from_exe: Downloaded export file (UserFile) from execution files
end_time_for_date_filtering_iso_8601_for: End time for date filtering (ISO 8601 format)
end_time_for_hold_date_filtering_iso_860: End time for hold date filtering (ISO 8601 format, MAIL/GROUPS only)
enter_export_id_optional_to_fetch_a_spec: Enter Export ID (optional to fetch a specific export)
enter_hold_id_optional_to_fetch_a_specif: Enter Hold ID (optional to fetch a specific hold)
enter_matter_id_optional_to_fetch_a_spec: Enter Matter ID (optional to fetch a specific matter)
include_files_in_shared_drives_for_drive: Include files in shared drives (for DRIVE corpus holds)
list_vault_matters_and_their_holds_to_pr: List Vault matters and their holds to produce a custodian preservation status report.
search_export_and_manage_holds_exports_f: Search, export, and manage holds/exports for Vault matters
search_query_terms_for_hold_mail_groups_: Search query terms for hold (MAIL/GROUPS only)
single_export_object_for_create_matters_: Single export object (for create_matters_export or list_matters_export with exportId)
single_hold_object_for_create_matters_ho: Single hold object (for create_matters_holds or list_matters_holds with holdId)
single_matter_object_for_create_matters_: Single matter object (for create_matters or list_matters with matterId)
start_time_for_date_filtering_iso_8601_f: Start time for date filtering (ISO 8601 format)
start_time_for_hold_date_filtering_iso_8: Start time for hold date filtering (ISO 8601 format, MAIL/GROUPS only)
token_for_fetching_next_page_of_results_: Token for fetching next page of results (for list operations)
